auth.login_description: Log in to access the VIDIS rostering application.

page/apps.headline: My apps
page/apps.subline: Here you can see the apps you've already unlocked

not-found.headline: App not found
not-found.description: The requested app could not be found or you do not have permission to view it.

page/user/no-school-available.headline: No school available for management
page/user/no-school-available.no_school_available_for_management: No school available for management. Please get in contact with an administrator if you think this is a mistake.

page/user/select-school.headline: Select school
page/user/select-school.select_school_to_administer: Please select the school you want to administer.

component/offer-settings.description: Manage settings for this app configuration.
component/offer-settings.school-release-granted: Release is granted for the entire school
component/offer-settings.please-select-at-least-one-group: Please select at least one group.
component/offer-settings.empty-copy: You have not yet unlocked this app yourself.
